ab: Ayuc, wa su sapah hu?
en: Ayuc, are you home?

ab: Wa ku sapah, awah cka nhari.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Sawa, wa su sapah hu?
en: Shuni, are you home?

ab: Uka hini Sawa wah! Ayuc ku ka yaku, niqan manu ddaun su hu? Miyah sapah ka Sawa daw tsaun mu.
ch: B:Sawa不在家耶!我是Ayuc，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Sawa。
en: Sawa is not at home. I am Ayuc. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: Ima namu ka yamu?
en: Who are you?

ab: Bubu rudan, yami u Trmi mi Kumu, dyawi nami rmawah rhngun!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Trmi 和 Kumu，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Trmi and Kumu, please open the door for us.

ab: Ima namu ka yamu hu?
en: Who is it?

ab: Awi ku ka yaku, miyah ku ming Temu ka yaku.
en: I am Awi, I am here for Temu.

ab: Bubu rudan, nisu ku miyah mita sunan da.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Bsiyaq su balay ini awah da, lnglungun misu balay.
ch: B:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Ayuc, ni ku miyah ming isu ppulah da.
en: Ayuc, I am here to play with you.

ab: Nhari miyah cka sapah, bsiyaq ku bay tmawa sunan da.
ch: B:快進來家裡，我等你好久了。
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: Pnhuma mu ka bunga ni, tlamay mkan binaw!
ch: B+:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: Chiya bay uqun ka bunga ni.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Awah! Pnhuma mu ka hiyi pnwalang ni, tlamay mkan pa!
ch: B+:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看！
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: Chiya bay equn ka hiyi pnwalang ni.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Tlung! Lhngay pnhuma mu ini cyuqi noyaku ka ni, tlami mkan binaw!
ch: B+:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: N! Balay bay chiya mi malu bay equn ka lhngay ni.
ch: A:嗚!這玉米真的好甜又好吃。
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: Mkan su mudu hu?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: Naqah ku mkan mudu ka yaku, mkan ku ringgo da malu da.
ch: A:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: Mkan su hlama hu?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: Iyaq, snkuxul ku bay mkan.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: Sqriyay misu pkan hiyi pnwalang.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Mhuway su balay! Laway bay biyuq na ka hiyi pnwalang ni.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: Biqun misu qsiya mahun su.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: Mhuway su balay.
en: Thank you.

ab: Kou hari qneqan su, ou bay sama pnchada mu.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: N! Balay bay malu bay sknexan mi malu equn uri.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: Kou hari qneqan su, niqan ou ka hini nina.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: So kiya daw, uxay ku mpqsiqa da wah!
ch: A:這樣的話，我不客氣了喔!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: Kou hari qneqan su, niqan ou ka hini nina.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Ou bay qnnqan mu da, uka ku brahan mkan da.
ch: A:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
